dbbot v0.0.1-beta.1 is the first public beta release.

This beta establishes the initial public repository shape for MySQL delivery, ClickHouse workflows, monitoring automation, and the portable Ansible runtime.

It also introduces the first managed GitHub collaboration layer for issues, labels, milestones, and release publishing.

This beta is intended for early adopters who want to evaluate repository structure, workflow direction, and release management before the first official release.
